task_name: Tampa City Council – Extract Upcoming Events and Deadlines
notes: Agent produced a comprehensive, highly organized upcoming_events.md with 40+ chronologically ordered entries covering all expected key dates (April 16 mega-meeting with Veterans Committee, Items 26-28, $650K reallocation; April 20 East Tampa Town Hall; May 7 LDC/ethics; May 15 Fire Station 24 GMP; August budget workshops; March 1 2027 capacity fee phase-in; September 2027/2028 milestones; ~60-day Rome Yard close; etc.). Each entry includes date, event, responsible party, and status. Dates are accurate. Context is rich and specific (e.g., '7 Council + 4 Mayoral appointments,' '$34.2M: $7M Phase 1 + $27.2M Phase 2,' 'accelerated from July 26'). The five-part 'What to Watch' section provides excellent synthesis of key storylines and accountability threads. No inefficiency or unnecessary verbose output detected. Meets all task requirements at high standard.
